overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character riding a horse through Mediterranean-style salt flats and a coastal village during golden hour. The scene features historic stone architecture, wooden windmills, and salt evaporation ponds with workers visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at a steady canter along the edge of salt evaporation ponds with white salt mounds

entered.detail: shallow water pools with reddish-pink hue used for salt harvesting
large conical piles of harvested white salt arranged in rows
simple wooden post fencing lining the dirt path
traditional stone windmill with wooden blades visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide view of salt evaporation ponds filled with white salt mounds. The rider moves along a dirt path bordered by wooden fencing, with the sun setting behind the ponds creating a warm golden reflection on the water. A stone windmill stands visible in the distant background.

events.description: enters built-up salt works area with stone warehouses and wooden storage carts

agents.ego_description: navigating the horse through the salt works village, passing between stone buildings and wooden carts

notable_agents.action: worker in dark clothing standing near a wooden cart, watching the rider pass
worker leaning against stone wall near wooden barrels

entered.detail: low stone building with arched doorway used for salt storage
large wooden wheeled carts with canvas covers parked along the path
stacked wooden barrels and sacks near the stone buildings
weathered stone retaining walls lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The rider enters a working village area with stone warehouses and wooden carts used for salt processing. Workers stand near the buildings and carts, observing the rider passing through. The path narrows between stone walls and storage structures before opening up again.

events.description: exits village onto open coastal path with rocky cliffs on the left and salt flats on the right
horse transitions from canter to full gallop as the path widens along the coast

agents.ego_description: galloping along the coastal path toward a large stone windmill, with the horse's pace increasing

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation rising beside the path
prominent stone windmill with multiple wooden blades and a conical roof
calm water visible beyond the salt flats in the distance

segments.scene_description: The rider emerges onto an open coastal path flanked by rocky cliffs on the left and salt flats on the right. The horse breaks into a full gallop as the terrain opens up. A large stone windmill dominates the view ahead, growing larger as the rider approaches and passes it on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the serene expanse of salt evaporation ponds into a bustling village and finally toward a towering coastal landmark. It begins on a dirt path bordered by wooden fencing, moving past white salt mounds that reflect the warm golden light of the setting sun. As the rider progresses, the open landscape narrows into a working village area filled with stone warehouses and wooden carts where workers observe the passage. The scene then opens up again as the rider emerges onto a coastal path flanked by rocky cliffs, with the horse breaking into a full gallop. Finally, the terrain expands toward the horizon as a large stone windmill dominates the view, growing larger until the rider passes directly by it.
